rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports, not implementation scopes
Use visible feature names and legal identifiers from the model when defining assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts
Define value ranges using boolean expressions combining comparison operators with visible variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks require valid component type or implementation scope placement
Guarantees must reference visible variables or features present in the model
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type contracts
Do not use undefined or non-visible identifiers in AGREE contracts
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
